name: Arizer Solo 2 Max
summary: A robust all-glass-path portable vaporiser for patients who want reliable all-day sessions at home or out.
description: The Solo 2 Max is Arizer's hybrid portable vaporiser with an all-glass vapour path, an OLED screen and degree-by-degree control from 50°C to 220°C. Heat-up is around 30 seconds, and a large battery delivers consistent vapour through a full day of medicating. The long glass aroma tube cools the draw and keeps flavour clean, with a full range of attachments available. It suits patients who value durability and flavour over a slim profile. It is larger and heavier than some pocket vapes at 210g, so it favours flavour and battery life over discreet portability.
